testimonials.name: Ms. Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: The simulation made abstract AI concepts tangible. My students were genuinely excited — they kept asking to run it again and try different settings.

testimonials.name: Principal Davis
testimonials.quote: A remarkable project. The presenter connected with every age group, and the hands-on component kept even our youngest students fully engaged.

testimonials.name: Alex T.
testimonials.quote: I never thought about how traffic lights could use AI. Now I want to study computer science. The RL explanation was actually easy to follow!

testimonials.name: Dr. Kim
testimonials.quote: This Gold Award project is exactly the kind of community-driven STEM outreach we need more of. The resources are high-quality and curriculum-aligned.

testimonials.name: Maya S.
testimonials.quote: The cybersecurity quiz was really fun and kind of scary — I didn't realize how easy it is to get phished. Changed how I think about online safety.

goals.goal: Reach 500 students across San Diego County
